title: schmaltzia standleyi
intro: Schmaltzia standleyi, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schmaltzia standleyi include the ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and aid in the healing process of wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
